login.heroSubtitle: Start and stop your AWS, Azure, GCP and OCI infrastructure from a single audited interface.
login.title: WiLauncher
login.lead: Sign in with your corporate account to access the console.
login.tenantWarning: Pending configuration: set auth.microsoftTenantId in environments when you receive Azure/Entra ID details.
login.security: WiLauncher never displays or stores cloud credentials. It only orchestrates actions through secure federated connections.

dashboard.emptyMessage: No machines match the current filters.

confirm.messageStart: You are about to start machine {{id}} in {{env}} environment.
confirm.messageStop: You are about to stop machine {{id}} in {{env}} environment.
confirm.prodMessageStart: A start order will be sent to {{name}} ({{id}}) in the {{env}} environment.
confirm.prodMessageStop: A shutdown order will be sent to {{name}} ({{id}}) in the {{env}} environment.
confirm.prodWarningStart: This machine is in PRODUCTION. Starting it may affect live service. Type the name to confirm.
confirm.prodWarningStop: This machine is in PRODUCTION. Shutting it down may interrupt live service. Type the name to confirm.
confirm.auditNote: This action will be recorded in the audit log with your user and timestamp.
